cases.description: SMA(10/30) crossover, long-only, on a deterministic rising-with-waves series.
RSI(14) mean reversion: buy oversold (<30), sell (>50), on an oscillating range.
EMA(5/15) trend following on a noisy uptrend.
Donchian(20) channel breakout: enter on a new high, exit on a new low.
Buy and hold: enter on the first bar and never exit.
